title: OR STATEMENT in Automations
excerpt:

This is “programming language”.

if Status changes to X, notify HR OR if status change to ZY notify…

posts.author: Tuko (Luis Alberto Ruiz)
posts.cookedHtml:
If we have IF STATEMENTS why not have the OR STATEMENT.
This is “programming language”.

If a contract status is accepted OR declined, move to archive.
if Status changes to X, notify HR OR if status change to ZY notify Marketing Dept.

It will make automations more simple, cleaner, and I believe with make us have more automation running on the same plan.
